items.notes: COMPETE-046 adds CAP-SCAN-01 repository realtime ingress: provider posture, authenticated normalized GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket webhook queueing into discovery.run outbox, and served worker execution against checkout_path or public/local clone_url. COMPETE-047 adds CAP-SCAN-02 local guardrails: staged Git blob scanning, base/head CI diff scanning, and pre-commit hook installation through the CLI without requiring a server. COMPETE-048 adds CAP-SCAN-03 full Git-history deep scans through the served API/CLI/UI using Gitleaks git --log-opts --all, additive custom [[rules]] fragments that extend defaults, response capability metadata, OpenAPI/SDK contracts, and execution tests. COMPETE-068 adds CAP-SCAN-04 third-party artifact ingest for CI/CD logs, container registries, Slack, and Jira through served API/CLI/UI paths backed by discovery.run outbox execution. Native provider signature verification, private credential_ref clone resolution, provider-native check annotations, central ingest for local CAP-SCAN-02 JSON, native Slack/Jira/container-registry API polling, and artifact retention automation remain documented architecture shortfalls rather than counted as served.

evidence: scanSecrets invokes the pinned Gitleaks binary through POST /api/v1/secrets/scans, parses only redacted rule/file/line metadata, and records findings through discovery events.

scanSecrets supports CAP-SCAN-03 by passing mode=git_history and custom_rules_path into the Gitleaks runner, which executes git-history scans with --log-opts --all, keeps the default 213-rule floor active, and adds custom [[rules]] fragments through a default-extending wrapper config.
receiveSecretRepositoryWebhook accepts normalized GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket repository events, upserts a secret_repo discovery source, and queues discovery.run outbox work for Gitleaks execution.

ingestThirdPartySecretScan accepts CI/CD log, container-registry, Slack, and Jira artifact paths, upserts a secret_third_party discovery source, and queues discovery.run outbox work for pinned Gitleaks execution without storing raw artifacts.
secrets scans staged-diff materializes only staged Git blobs or the head side of an explicit base/head diff into a temporary scan tree before invoking the same pinned Gitleaks runner.
secrets scans pre-commit install writes an executable pre-commit hook that blocks on the staged-diff scanner by default.
The served scan response reports the pinned default 213-rule Gitleaks ruleset, satisfying the 140+ rule floor.
